title: Internal ID custom to our organization
excerpt: We are using internal ID’s for project identifiers but we would like to write a formula so we can have our project ID’s in sequential order. Can anyone help with this? I have tired looking this up but I am not having any…

posts.author: Shelley1936 (Shelley )
posts.cookedHtml: We are using internal ID’s for project identifiers but we would like to write a formula so we can have our project ID’s in sequential order. Can anyone help with this? I have tired looking this up but I am not having any success. I would like our project ID’s to start FY26-0001 etc.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
What about using the “Item ID” column? You can customize it to start with identifiers you want.

image603×450 28.1 KB

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Limitation note: When using custom key prefixes for Item IDs (e.g., changing the default format), these items are not searchable in the global search. Vote for the enhancmenet idea here: Custom Key item ID search alignment - Feature requests

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Done! I didn’t realize that limitation, thanks Wally.

posts.author: Shelley1936 (Shelley )
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so much, not sure how I missed that. I think that could work for our group! I appreciate your response.
